log: === ROUND 1 ===

→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 15] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 10 falling damage. HP: 168/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.

=== ROUND 4 ===

→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person

→ Harengon — Iron Concentration healed for 5 HP. HP: 14/67
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Harengon — Iron Concentration with Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 39 damage. Harengon — Iron Concentration HP: 0/67
→ Harengon — Iron Concentration loses concentration on Greater Invisibility! [CON save 17 vs DC 19]
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
